Keychron Q1 Pro QMK/VIA Wireless Mechanical Keyboard

Current price $199.00 USD

Key Features

  • QMK/VIA programmable — full keymap customization
  • Bluetooth 5.1 + USB-C wired mode
  • South-facing hot-swap PCB (compatible with most MX switches)
  • Double-shot PBT keycaps, aluminum top case

Specifications

Layout75% (84 key)
Switch TypeHot-swap, MX compatible
ConnectivityBluetooth 5.1, USB-C
Battery4000 mAh
Weight1.35 kg (assembled)
Dimensions326 × 145 × 39 mm
SKUQ1P-M1

About This Item

The Q1 Pro is a premium 75% mechanical keyboard designed for enthusiasts who want wireless flexibility without compromising on build quality or firmware programmability.
